title: Harden terminal baseline diagnostics
goal: Make registry-truth treat missing baseline commits on verified tasks as hard freshness errors, and repair existing dead baseline metadata without claiming task incompletion.

metadata.source_review: Follow-up from Bureau improvement review: baseline warnings should be stronger for verified tasks.
metadata.safety_boundary: Hardens freshness diagnostics only; does not infer task incompletion from a dead baseline.
metadata.outcome: Implemented in Bureau PR #230: registry-truth now treats missing baseline_commit on verified tasks as hard freshness errors, while planned task baselines remain warnings; existing dead Lenskit baseline commits were removed from execution metadata and recorded as removed_dead_baseline_commit evidence.
validation: Bureau PR #230 GitHub CI passed validate (3.10) and validate (3.12).
Local before merge: python3 -m bureau.cli --root . check -> valid True.
Local before merge: python3 -m bureau.cli --root . --json registry-truth -> healthy true, 0 findings.
Local before merge: python3 -m bureau.cli --root . --json doctor -> healthy true.
Local before merge: python3 -m pytest tests/test_registry_truth.py tests/test_registry_queue.py tests/test_repository_registry_load.py -q -> 7 passed.
Local before merge: python3 -m ruff check src/bureau/registry_truth.py tests/test_registry_truth.py -> passed.
Local before merge: python3 -m pytest -> 357 passed.
Local before merge: git diff --check -> passed.
Post-merge: python3 -m bureau.cli --root . check -> valid True.
Post-merge: registry-truth healthy true with 0 findings.

verified_acceptance.verified-baseline-hard-error: tests/test_registry_truth.py covers a verified task with a missing baseline_commit and expects registry-truth unhealthy with severity error.
verified_acceptance.planned-baseline-warning: tests/test_registry_truth.py keeps the existing planned missing-baseline behavior healthy with warning only.
verified_acceptance.existing-baseline-cleanup: PR #230 removed 21 dead Lenskit baseline commits from execution metadata and recorded removed_dead_baseline_commit evidence with explicit non-claims; registry-truth now reports 0 findings.

acceptance.assertion: registry-truth reports missing baseline_commit on verified tasks as an error and unhealthy result.
planned tasks with missing baseline_commit remain warnings, because a dead planning baseline does not prove task completion state.
Existing dead Lenskit baseline commits are removed from execution metadata and recorded as removed_dead_baseline_commit evidence without changing task outcome claims.
